payload.label: rug
payload.long_description: Partial multicolored woven rug visible at the left edge of the crop with a beige/tan and muted blue patterned border on a low-pile weave, rectangular corner cut off by the image edge, lying on glossy reddish-brown hardwood; approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
